name: @keyboard-studio/facet-index
description: Offline per-keyboard facet index build tool (spec 036). Imports @keyboard-studio/engine source (codec, langtags) plus the pinned UCD data (scripts/ucd-version.json) to classify each keyboard in the keymanapp/keyboards corpus against the content/keyboard-facets/ definitions, and emits docs/keyboard-facet-index.json — the offline read surface downstream consumers (base-browser, gallery) query instead of scanning the corpus live. No build step; run via tsx.
